# Progressive disclosure without mode fragmentation

## Claim

A single behavioural mode with progressive disclosure beats dual basic/advanced modes for tools serving mixed-skill audiences. "Advanced mode reveals information; it does not change the safety model."

## Why it holds

Modes fragment defaults, double the QA surface, and turn the toggle into a foot-gun. Defaults can only be defended in one place — two modes mean two failure surfaces.
